---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working as expected

labels: bug

---

## Describe the bug
A clear description of what went wrong.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Run `wkappbot ...`
2. ...

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened (include exit code, error output).

## Diagnostics
```
wkappbot --diagnostics
```

## Environment
- OS: Windows 11 / Windows 10 (version?)
- wkappbot version: `wkappbot --version`
- Install location: `Documents\wkappbot` / other
